Sleuthkit Intro  
![][image1]  
At this challenge we got one file and port with host 

We got gzip file here so we need to extract it first  
![][image2]  
So we get  img extension here, need to do mmls to see the partition of the flag  
![][image3]  
We get 202752, so the final step is only remote this chall and send the partition  
![][image4]  
So we get the flag  
Flag : picoCTF{mm15\_f7w\!}
